2247590.name: Poly Smash
2247590.description:
Poly Smash is a competitive game where you and a friend compete in a two-player, split screen experience where you both are trying to destroy the highest number of acrylamide structures, to fuel The A.R.C and bring colour back into this dull world. You need to reach the point score or have the highest score by the end of the round.

You and your companion discover that the planet that you colonised is dangerous and you need to return the acrylamide used to construct the colony back to The A.R.C ( The Acrylamide Recolonisation Cruiser) before the gas reacts with the acrylamide in the structures to form a toxic gas. To do this you will need to destroy the most structures to fuel the A.R.C to escape.
2247590.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
